name: Transcend 32GB (1x32GB) 5600MHz C46 DDR5 Desktop Ram
description: Compliant with JEDEC international standards, Transcend’s new-gen DDR5 JetRam memory modules are manufactured with true ETT grade, brand-name DRAM chips that have passed Transcend’s strict screening process and rigorous environmental testing. DDR5 features two independent 32-bit channels that bring speeds to 5,600 MT/s. RAM Type: DDR5 DIMM Type: Unbuffered SO-DIMM CAS Latency: CL46 Component Composition: (2Gx8)x16
